requirement_topic.en: EMC Emissions — IRAM-IEC Harmonised Standards (CISPR 32 / IEC 55032)
requirement_topic.zh: EMC辐射发射——IRAM-IEC协调标准（CISPR 32 / IEC 55032）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC輻射發射——IRAM-IEC協調標準（CISPR 32 / IEC 55032）

summary.en: Argentina adopts IEC and CISPR standards through IRAM (Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación), which publishes corresponding IRAM-IEC standards. For multimedia and information-technology equipment — the primary category for Wi-Fi routers, smart speakers, and similar IoT devices — the applicable emissions standard is IRAM-IEC 55032 (harmonising CISPR 32), covering radiated and conducted emissions limits. Electromagnetic compatibility compliance is assessed as part of the ENACOM homologation process, with testing conducted by INTI or another ENACOM-recognised laboratory. Argentina does not have an independent CE-mark-style EMC self-declaration scheme; EMC is evaluated within the ENACOM type-approval process rather than through a separate market-surveillance declaration.
summary.zh: 阿根廷通过IRAM（阿根廷国家标准化与认证研究院）采用IEC和CISPR标准，并发布相应的IRAM-IEC标准。对于多媒体和信息技术设备——Wi-Fi路由器、智能音箱及类似物联网设备的主要类别——适用的发射标准为IRAM-IEC 55032（对应CISPR 32），涵盖辐射和传导发射限值。电磁兼容合规作为ENACOM型式认可程序的一部分进行评估，由INTI或ENACOM认可的其他实验室进行检测。阿根廷没有类似CE标志的独立EMC自声明方案；EMC在ENACOM型号认证程序内评估，而非通过单独的市场监督声明进行。
summary.zht: 阿根廷通過IRAM（阿根廷國家標準化與認證研究院）採用IEC和CISPR標準，並發布相應的IRAM-IEC標準。對於多媒體和資訊技術設備——Wi-Fi路由器、智慧音箱及類似物聯網裝置的主要類別——適用的發射標準為IRAM-IEC 55032（對應CISPR 32），涵蓋輻射和傳導發射限值。電磁相容合規作為ENACOM型式認可程序的一部分進行評估，由INTI或ENACOM認可的其他實驗室進行檢測。阿根廷沒有類似CE標誌的獨立EMC自聲明方案；EMC在ENACOM型號認證程序內評估，而非通過單獨的市場監督聲明進行。

standards_or_laws: IRAM-IEC 55032 (harmonises CISPR 32) — electromagnetic compatibility of multimedia equipment, emissions requirements
ENACOM homologation process — EMC testing assessed as part of type approval, not as a standalone self-declaration
IRAM (Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación) — Argentine national standards body publishing IRAM-IEC harmonised standards

summary.en: In China, EMC emissions compliance for information technology and multimedia equipment is governed primarily by GB/T 9254 (harmonising CISPR 22 / CISPR 32) for Class A and Class B radiated and conducted emissions, and by GB 17625.1 (harmonising IEC 61000-3-2) for harmonic current emissions. GB/T 9254 compliance is assessed as part of the CCC process for in-scope products and as a voluntary standard requirement for others. Chinese GB EMC standards are technically similar in structure to CISPR but are not accepted by ENACOM as equivalent; separate IRAM-IEC-based testing is required for the Argentine homologation process.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和多媒体设备的EMC辐射发射合规主要受GB/T 9254（对应CISPR 22 / CISPR 32）约束，适用A级和B级辐射及传导发射限值；谐波电流发射则受GB 17625.1（对应IEC 61000-3-2）约束。GB/T 9254合规作为范围内产品CCC程序的一部分进行评估，对其他产品则作为自愿性标准要求。中国GB EMC标准在结构上与CISPR技术上类似，但不被ENACOM视为等效；阿根廷型式认可程序要求进行独立的IRAM-IEC检测。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術和多媒體設備的EMC輻射發射合規主要受GB/T 9254（對應CISPR 22 / CISPR 32）約束，適用A級和B級輻射及傳導發射限值；諧波電流發射則受GB 17625.1（對應IEC 61000-3-2）約束。GB/T 9254合規作為範圍內產品CCC程序的一部分進行評估，對其他產品則作為自願性標準要求。中國GB EMC標準在結構上與CISPR技術上類似，但不被ENACOM視為等效；阿根廷型式認可程序要求進行獨立的IRAM-IEC檢測。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 (harmonises CISPR 22/32) — EMC emissions limits for information technology and multimedia equipment in China
GB 17625.1 (harmonises IEC 61000-3-2) — harmonic current emission limits in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes EMC testing for certain in-scope product categories

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 9254 EMC test reports and CCC certification are not accepted by ENACOM as satisfying IRAM-IEC 55032 (CISPR 32) requirements. EMC emissions testing must be conducted afresh under IRAM-IEC standards by INTI or another ENACOM-recognised laboratory as part of the Argentine homologation process. There is no EMC mutual recognition or test-report equivalence pathway between Argentina and China, nor between Argentina and CE-mark countries.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 9254 EMC检测报告和CCC认证不被ENACOM接受为满足IRAM-IEC 55032（CISPR 32）要求。作为阿根廷型式认可程序的一部分，须由INTI或ENACOM认可的其他实验室按照IRAM-IEC标准重新进行EMC发射检测。阿根廷与中国之间，以及阿根廷与CE标志国家之间，均无EMC相互认可或检测报告等效路径。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 9254 EMC檢測報告和CCC認證不被ENACOM接受為滿足IRAM-IEC 55032（CISPR 32）要求。作為阿根廷型式認可程序的一部分，須由INTI或ENACOM認可的其他實驗室按照IRAM-IEC標準重新進行EMC發射檢測。阿根廷與中國之間，以及阿根廷與CE標誌國家之間，均無EMC相互認可或檢測報告等效路徑。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC emissions compliance to IRAM-IEC 55032 assessed as part of ENACOM homologation; no standalone self-declaration pathway in Argentina
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for in-scope CCC products; voluntary/recommended for others — GB/T 9254 governs EMC emissions in China

source.publisher: IRAM — Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación (Argentina)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina harmonises CISPR 32 EMC emissions requirements through IRAM-IEC 55032, evaluated within the ENACOM homologation process by INTI or an ENACOM-recognised laboratory. Chinese GB/T 9254 test reports and CCC records are not accepted as equivalent. No CE-style EMC self-declaration is available in Argentina. Verify applicable IRAM-IEC standard editions and testing scope with a qualified Argentine regulatory professional before engaging a laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷通过IRAM-IEC 55032协调CISPR 32 EMC发射要求，由INTI或ENACOM认可的实验室在ENACOM型式认可程序内进行评估。中国GB/T 9254检测报告和CCC记录不被视为等效。阿根廷无类似CE的EMC自声明机制。在委托实验室之前，请向合格的阿根廷监管专业人士核验适用的IRAM-IEC标准版本和检测范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷通過IRAM-IEC 55032協調CISPR 32 EMC發射要求，由INTI或ENACOM認可的實驗室在ENACOM型式認可程序內進行評估。中國GB/T 9254檢測報告和CCC記錄不被視為等效。阿根廷無類似CE的EMC自聲明機制。在委託實驗室之前，請向合格的阿根廷監管專業人士核驗適用的IRAM-IEC標準版本和檢測範圍。

summary.en: For equipment sold in Argentina, EMC immunity requirements follow IRAM-IEC 61000 series standards (harmonising IEC 61000-4-x), covering immunity to electrostatic discharge (ESD), electrical fast transients, surge, conducted and radiated RF immunity, power frequency magnetic field, and voltage dips and interruptions. Immunity testing is conducted as part of the ENACOM homologation process by INTI or an ENACOM-recognised accredited laboratory. Argentina does not operate a separate CE-style immunity self-declaration; immunity compliance is embedded within the ENACOM type-approval evaluation. The applicable immunity standard for multimedia and IT equipment is the general IRAM-IEC 61000-4 series, aligned with the IEC 61000-6-1 or IEC 61000-6-3 generic immunity standards depending on the intended environment.
summary.zh: 在阿根廷销售的设备，EMC抗扰度要求遵循IRAM-IEC 61000系列标准（对应IEC 61000-4-x），涵盖对静电放电（ESD）、电快速瞬变脉冲群、浪涌、传导和辐射射频抗扰度、工频磁场以及电压暂降和中断的抗扰度。抗扰度检测由INTI或ENACOM认可的认可实验室作为ENACOM型式认可程序的一部分进行。阿根廷不实行单独的类似CE的抗扰度自声明；抗扰度合规嵌入ENACOM型号认证评估中。多媒体和IT设备适用的抗扰度标准为IRAM-IEC 61000-4系列，根据预期环境与IEC 61000-6-1或IEC 61000-6-3通用抗扰度标准一致。
summary.zht: 在阿根廷銷售的設備，EMC抗擾度要求遵循IRAM-IEC 61000系列標準（對應IEC 61000-4-x），涵蓋對靜電放電（ESD）、電快速暫態脈衝群、突波、傳導和輻射射頻抗擾度、工頻磁場以及電壓暫降和中斷的抗擾度。抗擾度檢測由INTI或ENACOM認可的認可實驗室作為ENACOM型式認可程序的一部分進行。阿根廷不實行單獨的類似CE的抗擾度自聲明；抗擾度合規嵌入ENACOM型號認證評估中。多媒體和IT裝置適用的抗擾度標準為IRAM-IEC 61000-4系列，根據預期環境與IEC 61000-6-1或IEC 61000-6-3通用抗擾度標準一致。

standards_or_laws: IRAM-IEC 61000-4 series (harmonises IEC 61000-4-x) — EMC immunity test methods in Argentina
IEC 61000-6-1 / IEC 61000-6-3 — generic immunity standards for residential and light-industrial environments (referenced via IRAM harmonisation)
ENACOM homologation process — immunity compliance evaluated as part of Argentine type approval by INTI or accredited laboratory

summary.en: In China, EMC immunity requirements for information technology and multimedia equipment are governed by GB/T 17626 series (harmonising IEC 61000-4-x), covering ESD, electrical fast transients, surge, and RF immunity. GB/T 17626 immunity compliance is typically assessed as part of CCC for in-scope products and as a recommended/voluntary requirement for others. GB/T 17626 is technically aligned with IEC 61000-4 but Chinese test reports and CCC records are not accepted by ENACOM as satisfying Argentine IRAM-IEC 61000-series requirements.
summary.zh: 在中国，信息技术和多媒体设备的EMC抗扰度要求受GB/T 17626系列（对应IEC 61000-4-x）约束，涵盖ESD、电快速瞬变脉冲群、浪涌和射频抗扰度。GB/T 17626抗扰度合规通常作为范围内产品CCC程序的一部分进行评估，对其他产品则作为推荐/自愿要求。GB/T 17626在技术上与IEC 61000-4一致，但中国检测报告和CCC记录不被ENACOM接受为满足阿根廷IRAM-IEC 61000系列要求。
summary.zht: 在中國，資訊技術和多媒體設備的EMC抗擾度要求受GB/T 17626系列（對應IEC 61000-4-x）約束，涵蓋ESD、電快速暫態脈衝群、突波和射頻抗擾度。GB/T 17626抗擾度合規通常作為範圍內產品CCC程序的一部分進行評估，對其他產品則作為建議/自願要求。GB/T 17626在技術上與IEC 61000-4一致，但中國檢測報告和CCC記錄不被ENACOM接受為滿足阿根廷IRAM-IEC 61000系列要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 17626 series (harmonises IEC 61000-4-x) — EMC immunity test methods in China
CCC (China Compulsory Certification) — includes immunity testing for certain in-scope product categories

gap.en: Chinese GB/T 17626 EMC immunity test reports are not accepted by ENACOM as equivalent to IRAM-IEC 61000-series testing. Immunity must be re-tested under IRAM-IEC 61000-4-x standards by INTI or another ENACOM-recognised laboratory as part of the Argentine homologation. No mutual recognition or report-sharing pathway exists between Argentina and China for EMC immunity. Argentina uses 220V/50Hz with unique type-I plugs, which affects surge and electrical-fast-transient test conditions compared with 220V/50Hz Chinese supply configurations.
gap.zh: 中国GB/T 17626 EMC抗扰度检测报告不被ENACOM接受为与IRAM-IEC 61000系列检测等效。须由INTI或ENACOM认可的其他实验室按IRAM-IEC 61000-4-x标准重新进行抗扰度检测，作为阿根廷型式认可的一部分。阿根廷与中国之间不存在EMC抗扰度的相互认可或报告共享路径。阿根廷使用220V/50Hz独特I型插头，与中国220V/50Hz供电配置相比，这会影响浪涌和电快速瞬变脉冲群测试条件。
gap.zht: 中國GB/T 17626 EMC抗擾度檢測報告不被ENACOM接受為與IRAM-IEC 61000系列檢測等效。須由INTI或ENACOM認可的其他實驗室按IRAM-IEC 61000-4-x標準重新進行抗擾度檢測，作為阿根廷型式認可的一部分。阿根廷與中國之間不存在EMC抗擾度的相互認可或報告共享路徑。阿根廷使用220V/50Hz獨特I型插頭，與中國220V/50Hz供電配置相比，這會影響突波和電快速暫態脈衝群測試條件。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — EMC immunity to IRAM-IEC 61000-4 series assessed as part of ENACOM homologation process; no standalone self-declaration pathway
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for in-scope CCC products; voluntary/recommended for others — GB/T 17626 governs EMC immunity in China

source.publisher: IRAM — Instituto Argentino de Normalización y Certificación (Argentina)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Argentina assesses EMC immunity to the IRAM-IEC 61000-4 series within the ENACOM homologation process; no standalone immunity self-declaration exists. Chinese GB/T 17626 test reports and CCC records are not accepted as equivalent. Immunity test conditions should account for Argentina's 220V/50Hz supply and type-I plug configuration. Verify applicable IRAM-IEC 61000-series standard editions and immunity test scope with a qualified Argentine regulatory professional before engaging a laboratory.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 阿根廷在ENACOM型式认可程序内按IRAM-IEC 61000-4系列评估EMC抗扰度；不存在单独的抗扰度自声明机制。中国GB/T 17626检测报告和CCC记录不被视为等效。抗扰度测试条件应考虑阿根廷220V/50Hz电源和I型插头配置。在委托实验室之前，请向合格的阿根廷监管专业人士核验适用的IRAM-IEC 61000系列标准版本和抗扰度检测范围。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 阿根廷在ENACOM型式認可程序內按IRAM-IEC 61000-4系列評估EMC抗擾度；不存在單獨的抗擾度自聲明機制。中國GB/T 17626檢測報告和CCC記錄不被視為等效。抗擾度測試條件應考慮阿根廷220V/50Hz電源和I型插頭配置。在委託實驗室之前，請向合格的阿根廷監管專業人士核驗適用的IRAM-IEC 61000系列標準版本和抗擾度檢測範圍。
